title: BUG #18091: Unexpected Result by enable_material
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5(c1 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c2 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, c3 BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO t5(c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test1'), (2, NULL), (3, 'test3');
CREATE TABLE t6(c0 FLOAT, c1 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT DISTINCT t5.c1 FROM t5 JOIN t6 ON t5.c1 = CAST(t6.c0 AS INTEGER);
